parsed.production_notes: The video uses a mixed production approach. The hand interacting with the screen appears to be human-recorded, while the background illustrations exhibit the blended textures and slightly uncanny details typical of AI-generated art.

characters.appearance: A fair-skinned human hand, likely female, with slender fingers and short, unpainted nails. Only the hand and part of the forearm are visible.
characters.wardrobe: No clothing is visible on the arm.
characters.demeanor: Deliberate and precise, pointing and tapping.

scenes.setting: Digital app interface with a dark farm illustration.

panels.panel_visual_description: A stylized, flat-art illustration depicts a farm scene at night. In the foreground, a row of various farm animals stands facing forward. The group includes white horses, fluffy sheep, and small chickens. Behind the animals looms a dark, geometric building. The structure features a large, stylized pig face at its peak and a windmill-like element. The overall color palette is dark and moody, utilizing blacks, grays, and muted browns to create a somber atmosphere.

The panel consists entirely of a plain, solid white background. A fair-skinned human hand, Character A, enters the frame from the bottom edge. The hand is positioned with the index finger extended, pointing upwards. The other fingers are curled inward towards the palm. The hand makes subtle, deliberate tapping motions against the white void. The lighting on the hand is even and natural, suggesting a studio setup.

scenes.visual_description: The screen is split horizontally into two distinct sections. The top half displays a dark, stylized illustration of farm animals standing before a geometric building. The bottom half is a white background overlaid with a block of text. A human hand enters from the bottom and taps on specific words within the text. When a word is tapped, a small pop-up box appears containing a translation and pronunciation guide. The hand continues to interact with different words as the scene progresses.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Unknown speaker 1 says: "All animals are equal, but some animals are more important than others,"
Unknown speaker 2 says: equal
scenes.on_screen_text:
BACA BUKU BERBAHASA INGGRIS 10 MENIT SEHARI
"All animals are equal, but some animals are more important than others," one of them read slowly.
The animals stood silent in the cold night, staring at the wall. They tried to remember the old words, but something felt wrong. No one spoke. The farm looked the same as always, yet nothing was the same anymore.
equal [ˈiːkwəl] setara
Tahu ini Belajar
important [ɪmˈpɔːrtnt] penting
animals [ˈænɪməlz] hewan

scenes.setting: Digital app interface with a golden-hour farm illustration.

panels.panel_visual_description: A warm, painterly illustration showcases farm animals bathed in soft, golden-hour light. In the immediate foreground, the detailed heads of a brown cow, a white sheep, and a light brown horse are prominently featured. The animals look towards the viewer with gentle expressions. In the background, a flock of sheep grazes near a classic red barn. The sky above is a hazy, yellowish hue, contributing to the warm atmosphere. The artwork has a slightly blended, digital painting quality typical of AI generation.

The panel features a completely plain, solid white background. A fair-skinned human hand, Character A, is visible, entering the frame from the lower edge. The index finger is extended straight up, while the remaining fingers are folded back. The hand moves slightly across the white space, performing precise tapping gestures. The skin tone is even, and the nails are kept short and natural. The lighting remains consistent and flat across the hand and background.

scenes.visual_description: The horizontal split-screen layout continues, but the top image has changed. The top half now shows a warm, golden-hour illustration of a cow, sheep, and horse. The bottom half remains a white background with the same block of text. The human hand continues to navigate the text, tapping on various words. Each tap triggers a new pop-up box with translation details. The hand moves rhythmically, highlighting different parts of the passage.
